rogueprogress.gui.title: Rogue Progress
rogueprogress.gui.reset_confirm: Reset all attributes and refund a portion of spent souls?
rogueprogress.command.reload: Reloaded caps configuration from persistent config
Maximum Strength attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
rogueprogress.configuration.healthCap.to: Maximum Health attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
rogueprogress.configuration.speedCap.too: Maximum Speed attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
rogueprogress.configuration.armorCap.too: Maximum Armor attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
rogueprogress.configuration.luckCap.tool: Maximum Luck attribute value players can reach through upgrades.
rogueprogress.configuration.strengthFlat: Flat damage added per Strength level (before tier break). 1.0 = +1 attack damage.
rogueprogress.configuration.strengthPerc: Percent attack damage bonus per Strength level (before tier break), as decimal. 0.03 = +3%.
rogueprogress.configuration.strengthTier: Level at which Strength switches to later-tier  0 to disable tiering.
rogueprogress.configuration.strengthFlat: Flat damage added per Strength level after tier break.
rogueprogress.configuration.strengthPerc: Percent attack damage bonus per Strength level after tier break, as decimal.
rogueprogress.configuration.healthFlatPe: Flat max health added per Health level. 2.0 = +1 heart.
rogueprogress.configuration.healthPercen: Percent max health bonus per Health level, as decimal.
rogueprogress.configuration.speedFlatPer: Flat movement speed added per Speed level.
rogueprogress.configuration.speedPercent: Percent movement speed bonus per Speed level, as decimal. 0.01 = +1%.
rogueprogress.configuration.armorFlatPer: Flat armor added per Armor level (before tier break).
rogueprogress.configuration.armorPercent: Percent armor bonus per Armor level (before tier break), as decimal. 0.04 = +4%.
rogueprogress.configuration.armorTierBre: Level at which Armor switches to later-tier  0 to disable tiering.
rogueprogress.configuration.armorFlatPer: Flat armor added per Armor level after tier break.
rogueprogress.configuration.armorPercent: Percent armor bonus per Armor level after tier break, as decimal.
rogueprogress.configuration.luckFlatPerL: Flat Luck attribute points added per Luck level.
rogueprogress.configuration.luckPercentP: Percent luck bonus per Luck level, as decimal.
